title: LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
